ast.target: 高级排除：正在更新文件树...

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Patterns to ignore files and folders.
ast.target: 用于忽略文件和文件夹的模式。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Each pattern should be on a new line.

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Whether to ignore files that are excluded by

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: How to exclude files and folders.
ast.target: 如何排除文件和文件夹。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: - Exclude files and folders from the entire Obsidian app, including the Files Pane, Backlinks, Graph, etc.
ast.target: - 从整个 Obsidian 应用程序（包括文件窗格、反向链接、图谱等）中排除文件和文件夹。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: - Exclude files and folders from the Files Pane only.
ast.target: - 仅从文件窗格中排除文件和文件夹。

ast.name: error
ast.source: No Intl support, please use an Intl polyfill!
ast.target: 不支持 Intl，请使用 Intl polyfill！

ast.name: warn
ast.source: accessing an object - but returnObjects options is not enabled!
ast.target: 正在访问一个对象 - 但未启用 returnObjects 选项！

ast.name: warn
ast.source: This means something IS WRONG in your setup. You access the t function before i18next.init / i18next.loadNamespace / i18next.changeLanguage was done. Wait for the callback or Promise to resolve before accessing it!!!
ast.target: 这意味着您的设置中存在错误。您在 i18next.init / i18next.loadNamespace / i18next.changeLanguage 完成之前访问了 t 函数。请等待回调或 Promise 解析后再访问它！！！

ast.name: warn
ast.source: nesting options string contains interpolated variables with escapeValue: false — if any of those values are attacker-controlled they can inject additional nesting options (e.g. redirect lng/ns). Sanitise untrusted input before passing it to t(), or keep escapeValue: true.
ast.target: 嵌套选项字符串包含转义值为 false 的插值变量 - 如果这些值中的任何一个由攻击者控制，他们可以注入额外的嵌套选项（例如重定向 lng/ns）。在将不受信任的输入传递给 t() 之前对其进行清理，或者保持 escapeValue 为 true。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: No backend was added via i18next.use. Will not load resources.
ast.target: 未通过 i18next.use 添加后端。将不会加载资源。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: init: no languageDetector is used and no lng is defined
ast.target: init：未使用 languageDetector 且未定义 lng

ast.name: warn
ast.source: init: i18next is already initialized. You should call init just once!
ast.target: init：i18next 已经初始化。您应该只调用 init 一次！

ast.name: warn
ast.source: I18N was not initialized, initializing default obsidian-dev-utils translations
ast.target: I18N 尚未初始化，正在初始化默认的 obsidian-dev-utils 翻译
